title: Central Karoo KFC Mini Cricket Festival kicks off in Graaff-Reinet
description: GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The Central Karoo KFC...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The Central Karoo KFC region hosted its annual KFC mini cricket festival at the Botanical Gardens on 13 September.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The Central Karoo KFC region hosted its annual KFC mini cricket festival at the Botanical Gardens on 13 September."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Eleven schools in and around Graaff-Reinet participated in the festival, which had 25 coaches and 200 players taking part, said Sade Daniels, KFC mini cricket co-ordinator for the region."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This is the third annual festival and opens the mini cricket season.","html":"This is the third annual festival and opens the mini cricket season."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A total of 52 games were played. It was great fun for the kids, who dressed in white and red sponsored by KFC.","html":"A total of 52 games were played. It was great fun for the kids, who dressed in white and red sponsored by KFC."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"KFC also sponsored the teams with lunch packs, equipment and clothing for both coaches and players, and the hiring of the field.","html":"KFC also sponsored the teams with lunch packs, equipment and clothing for both coaches and players, and the hiring of the field."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Patrick Linch of Botanical Gardens sponsored lunch packs for the coaches.","html":"Patrick Linch of Botanical Gardens sponsored lunch packs for the coaches."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The organisers would like to thank the sponsors for making the day possible, as well as the players, parents and coaches for the fun-filled day.","html":"The organisers would like to thank the sponsors for making the day possible, as well as the players, parents and coaches for the fun-filled day."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"What happens after the festival?"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The schools will play a minimum of 30 fixtures for the season. The games can be interclass/ intergrade or even inter-schools.","html":"The schools will play a minimum of 30 fixtures for the season. The games can be interclass/ intergrade or even inter-schools."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Teams are made up of boys under 10 and girls under 13 and younger.","html":"Teams are made up of boys under 10 and girls under 13 and younger."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Central Karoo KFC Mini Cricket Festival kicks off in Graaff-Reinet
